title: Evolved Policy Gradients
summary: We’re releasing an experimental metalearning approach called Evolved Policy Gradients, a method that evolves the loss function of learning agents, which can enable fast training on novel tasks. Agents trained with EPG can succeed at basic tasks at test time that were outside their training regime, like learning to navi

title: Retro Contest
summary: We’re launching a transfer learning contest that measures a reinforcement learning algorithm’s ability to generalize from previous experience.
summaryZh: 我们正在推出一项转移学习竞赛，以衡量强化学习算法根据以往经验进行概括的能力。
